_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of joint doctrine targeting concepts (JP 3-60).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of entity resolution methods, including deterministic matching rules, probabilistic matching, and ML-based matching, and the precision-recall trade-offs involved.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-005 (DQ, cosine: 0.390), DG-K-009 (DG, cosine: 0.369).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.5/10 (raw 0.254). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [3, 60, concepts, doctrine, joint, jp] vs WIDAI-only terms [based, deterministic, entity, involved, matching, methods] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.843 (P=0.851, R=0.836). Balanced P/R — the 8-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (96.0%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of joint doctrine targeting concepts (JP 3-60)." and "Knowledge of entity resolution methods, including deterministic matching rules,". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.461 > STS 0.254 (gap +0.207). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [3, 60, concepts, doctrine, joint, jp]. WIDAI-only: [based, deterministic, entity, involved, matching, methods].
